description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in historical attire, including a tall hat, a draped cape with detailed texture, and fitted trousers. The figure stands on a rectangular plinth, with one leg slightly bent and the other straight, giving a relaxed yet thoughtful pose. His right hand is raised to his chin, suggesting contemplation, while his left hand rests on his hip, partially covered by the cape. The facial features and clothing details are finely rendered, with visible folds and buttons on the jacket and cape. The back of the sculpture shows the cape's full drape and texture, while the front highlights the expressive posture and facial expression. The overall form is solid and monolithic, typical of stone or cast sculptures found in public urban spaces.
description: A detailed sculpture of a contemplative man in historical dress, standing on a rectangular plinth with a textured cape and tall hat.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full drape and texture of the cape, with the figure's head turned slightly to the side.
description_view_1: Three-quarter view highlighting the figure's thoughtful pose, with the right hand to the chin and the left hand on the hip.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the facial features, expressive posture, and detailed clothing, including the tall hat and cape.
description_view_3: Side-rear view emphasizing the side profile of the face, the arm positions, and the cape's texture.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
